items.title: Akshay Kumar’s Bhooth Bangla Out on OTT: Know Where to Stream This Horror-Comedy Online
items.summary: Written and directed by Priyadarshan, Bhooth Bangla is a horror-comedy film that is now streaming on Netflix. The film stars Akshay Kumar in the lead role.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: A German Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
items.summary: The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.

items.title: Innovating for India’s Rightful Place in the World
items.summary: This Rigvedic invocation has guided India’s civilisational openness to knowledge. Today, it finds urgent expression in innovation.
